-- Auto-generated by YouBindCollector. Do not modify.
function FirstLuaWindow_InitializeView(root)
    if root == nil then
        print("[FirstLuaWindow.bind] root is nil")
        return nil
    end

    local view = {}
    local node_0 = root:Find("AllType/Button")
    view["Button_Button"] = node_0 and node_0:GetComponent(typeof(CS.UnityEngine.UI.Button)) or nil

    local node_1 = root:Find("AllType/RawImage")
    view["Raw_RawImage"] = node_1 and node_1:GetComponent(typeof(CS.UnityEngine.UI.RawImage)) or nil

    local node_2 = root:Find("AllType/Toggle/2")
    view["Text_2"] = node_2 and node_2:GetComponent(typeof(CS.UnityEngine.UI.Text)) or nil

    local node_3 = root:Find("AllType/Dropdown/Label")
    view["Text_Label"] = node_3 and node_3:GetComponent(typeof(CS.UnityEngine.UI.Text)) or nil

    local node_4 = root:Find("AllType/InputField/Placeholder")
    view["Text_Placeholder"] = node_4 and node_4:GetComponent(typeof(CS.UnityEngine.UI.Text)) or nil

    local node_5 = root:Find("AllType/InputField/Text")
    view["Text_Text"] = node_5 and node_5:GetComponent(typeof(CS.UnityEngine.UI.Text)) or nil

    local node_6 = root:Find("Text555")
    view["Text_Text555"] = node_6 and node_6:GetComponent(typeof(CS.UnityEngine.UI.Text)) or nil

    local node_7 = root:Find("AllType/tip23424")
    view["Text_tip23424"] = node_7 and node_7:GetComponent(typeof(CS.UnityEngine.UI.Text)) or nil

    local node_8 = root:Find("AllType/Dropdown/Template/Viewport/Content/Item")
    view["Toggle_Item"] = node_8 and node_8:GetComponent(typeof(CS.UnityEngine.UI.Toggle)) or nil

    local node_9 = root:Find("AllType/Toggle")
    view["Toggle_Toggle"] = node_9 and node_9:GetComponent(typeof(CS.UnityEngine.UI.Toggle)) or nil

    print("[FirstLuaWindow.bind] InitializeView result:")
    for key, value in pairs(view) do
        print("[FirstLuaWindow.bind] " .. key, value)
    end
    return view
end
